title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. cinerascens
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. cinerascens, also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. cinerascens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
